channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Buying the Most Sold Vehicle in the World, the Tesla Model Y — What Are Your Options?
item.description: You’ve decided to buy the car that for the last few years has been the top sold model in the world, gas or electric, the Tesla Model Y. Tesla has factories in California (Fremont), China (Shanghai), Texas (Austin), and Germany (Berlin) that have been churning them out for the US, ... [continued...

item.title: This 2023 Model 3 Has Tesla’s Durable Battery. It Still Degraded
item.description: Its LFP pack had 90% health at 26,000 miles. That’s not a disaster, but it’s worse than the chemistry’s reputation suggests.

item.title: $4.1 Billion Deal Shows Why Ferrari and Tesla Are Ditching Copper for a Substitute
item.description: Substitution is one of the fundamental economic forces. If a product goes up in price, consumers have a direct incentive to switch to a cheaper substitute. While branding power dictates some price flexibility, such calculations are more straightforward for fungible...

item.title: Tesla vs BYD: Two Paths to EV Leadership, One Winner
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and BYD (OTC:BYDDF) sit at opposite poles of the electric vehicle world. Tesla just posted a sharp Q1 margin rebound while pouring cash into robotics and autonomy. BYD, the world’s largest new energy vehicle maker by volume, keeps flooding global markets with affordable EVs an...

item.title: Elon Musk Says Optimus Production Will Be 'Extremely Slow' in the Beginning: 'This is Not Like Making a Car'
item.description: Elon Musk pushed back Wednesday against speculation that Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ) is ahead of schedule on production of its Optimus V3 humanoid robot, saying the company’s initial ramp will be extremely slow because Tesla is building an entirely new manufacturing...

item.title: Tesla: AI Ambitions Can't Yet Offset Automotive Weakness
California vs. Elon Musk: Tesla Snubbed as New EV Incentives Boost Rivian, Lucid
item.description: The state of California is offering new incentives to first-time electric vehicle buyers, with legislation passed for purchases without an application needed. The new incentives could help Rivian Automotive and Lucid Group, while notably ignoring Tesla Inc. New First-Time Buyer...

item.title: Tesla's $1.4 trillion valuation rests on what happens next in one city
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is bringing its robotaxi pitch to another major U.S. city. The electric-vehicle maker said Friday its robotaxi service is now available in Miami, another move in Elon Musk’s effort to turn Tesla’s self-driving software into a broader ride-hailing business.

item.title: Down 35%, Is MercadoLibre Stock a Better Buy than SpaceX and the "Magnificent Seven" Stocks in July?
item.description: The largest-cap stocks may have limited upside.

item.title: "Big Short" Investor Michael Burry Is Now Betting Against Micron, Nvidia, and Tesla. Should You Be Worried?
item.description: The investor who called the housing crash just published his bets against three of the market's favorite stocks.

item.title: Cathie Wood buys $38.1 million of tumbling megacap stock
item.description: Cathie Wood, chief of Ark Investment Management, is known for buying “disruptive” tech stocks during market pullbacks. That’s what she just did, adding one of her highest-conviction investments, Tesla, as the stock fell more than 7% in a day. In 2025, the flagship Ark Innovation ETF gained 35.49%...

item.title: Rivian Just Raised Its 2026 Outlook While Tesla Stock Stumbled. Is the Electric Vehicle Underdog Finally a Buy?
item.description: The electric vehicle maker just raised its full-year outlook -- and the hard part starts now.

item.title: Bill Ackman Drives a Tesla: Here's Why He Won't Buy the Stock
item.description: Ackman explains the core of his investment philosophy rooted in the wisdom of Warren Buffett.

item.title: BYD Beats Tesla — Again
item.description: One of our team members mentioned yesterday that BYD beat Tesla in BEV sales last quarter, and that we should have an article about it. I did publish such comparisons in the past, so it was definitely on me to get a new one out now. (To be honest, I ...

item.title: Here’s Why Tesla Inc. (TSLA) is a Top Robotics Stock to Buy Amid Robotaxi and Optimus Developments
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the best robotics stocks to buy. On June 25, Barclays reiterated an Equalweight rating on Tesla Inc.

item.title: GM is flooding dealers with Bolt EVs – is that part of the plan?
item.description: GM raised plenty of eyebrows when it announced that its resurrected 2027 Chevrolet Bolt – one of the lowest-priced, most capable new EVs in North America – would only be built for a single model year. Despite the limited-time offer and solid sales , dealers are still sitting on 118 days’ of inven...

item.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor Turns Elon Musk's Viral July 4 Video Into A Bitcoin Pitch: 'We Can Still Make Something Ƀetter'
item.description: Saylor regularly ties Bitcoin to U.S. holidays, framing it as a tool for American economic strength.

item.title: MarketBeat Week in Review – 06/29 - 07/03
item.description: MarketBeat's weekly roundup covers a weaker June jobs report, tech sector rotation, and top analyst picks including TSLA, AVGO, PLTR, MRNA, and NEE heading into Q2 earnings season.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Expands Robotaxi Service To Miami With Cybercabs On Public Roads
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) is expanding its robotaxi service to Miami, moving beyond its initial operations in Texas and California. The company is rolling out production-line Cybercabs that are now undergoing on-road testing in Miami. This marks a new phase in Tesla’s autonomous ride-hailing push and...

item.title: Tesla Beat Delivery Estimates by 74,000 Vehicles -- and the Stock Had Its Worst Day in Nearly a Year. Here's Why.
item.description: How does a company crush its own sales target and get punished for it?

item.title: SpaceX's Next Big Business Isn't Rockets. It's Computer Chips.
item.description: The newly public space company is quietly buying its way into the AI hardware race.

item.title: Tesla Has A Blowout Q2 — The Story Behind The Numbers
item.description: Although Zach did a great job of covering Tesla’s sales report, I want to mention a few other factors and talk about the broader market. Tesla’s strong Q2 deliveries resulted from converging tailwinds: elevated oil prices from the Iran conflict, refreshed Model Y and YL demand, US incentives, new...

item.title: Elon Musk's X Money — New Details On Bank Killer Super App
item.description: Elon Musk’s X Money is rolling out with an aggressive feature set, likely making legacy banks nervous. Powered by a metal Visa card and a deeply integrated wallet inside the X app, the so‑called "bank killer" now has hard numbers...

item.title: Texas man charged in fatal Tesla crash where he blamed Autopilot
item.description: A Texas man has been arrested and charged with manslaughter after his Tesla crashed into a home last month, striking a woman inside and killing her. The driver, Michael Butler, claimed the vehicle was in self-driving mode, but information from Tesla shows that Butler overrode the system. Butler w...

item.title: Podcast: Tesla Model YL, Q2 deliveries, BMW iX5, and more
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss the launch of the Tesla Model YL, BMW iX5, and EV sales results for the second quarter.

item.title: Tesla Launches Unsupervised Robotaxi Rides in Miami
item.description: Tesla Launches Unsupervised Robotaxi Rides in Miami

item.title: Tesla’s strong Q2 deliveries: Four key drivers behind the surprise
item.description: Tesla shocked with its quarterly delivery report yesterday by reporting it delivered 480,126 vehicles in the second quarter of 2026, a 25 percent year-over-year jump that crushed Wall Street estimates of roughly 400,000–408,000 units. Production reached 451,758, with Model 3 and Model Y accountin...

item.title: Worried About Tesla's 7% Slump Post Solid Q2 Deliveries? Grab These ETFs
item.description: TSLA's shares slide 7.5% even after record Q2 deliveries, but ETFs may offer a diversified way to capture its long-term robotics potential.

item.title: Meet the Major Artificial Intelligence (AI) CPU Player That Just Joined Nvidia, Tesla, and Palantir as One of the Most Popular Stocks on Robinhood
item.description: Robinhood keeps an updated list of its 10-most owned stocks on the platform.

item.title: Tesla Vs. SpaceX: Here’s Which Will Outperform the Other by the End of July
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) and SpaceX (NASDAQ: SPCX) sit on opposite ends of Elon Musk’s empire this July. Tesla is walking into a July 22 Q2 earnings report with vehicle margins under a microscope. SpaceX is fresh off its historic June IPO, riding institutional rotation into launch, Starlink, and its ...

item.title: Elon Musk Has Mojo Back, As Tesla Deliveries Skyrocket
item.description: Tesla’s (NASDAQ:TSLA) blowout Q2 delivery report is a legitimate win for the bulls. However, I’d argue that this beat does not settle the bigger debate around the stock. What is this debate, you might ask?

item.title: Tesla Caps Staff AI Spending
item.description: The company is limiting weekly AI tool costs as employee token use rises.

item.title: Elon Musk Responds to 'Crash Is Coming' Narrative, Says 'Momentary Dips' Exist but 'The Macro Trend Is Overwhelmingly Up'
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla Inc CEO Elon Musk said Tuesday that short-term economic setbacks are inevitable but argued that artificial intelligence and robotics will drive a powerful long-term economic growth. Musk Pushes Back On AI Crash Thesis Musk was responding to...

item.title: UK EV registrations hit 30% share in June as Tesla rebounds 42%
item.description: British battery-electric vehicle registrations jumped 38% in June to 64,440 units, pushing EVs to nearly 30% of the new car market — their strongest monthly performance outside seasonal peaks, according to New AutoMotive data released Friday. The overall market grew 15% year-over-year to 215,921 ...

item.title: Tesla Insurance Is Coming Soon to Washington
item.description: Tesla Insurance Is Coming Soon to Washington

item.title: Tesla Semi involved in first known fatal crash in Nevada
item.description: A Tesla Semi was involved in a fatal collision on U.S. Highway 50 in Dayton, Nevada, on Sunday, June 28, 2026, marking the first known fatal crash involving the electric Class 8 truck. The incident occurred around 7:20 a.m.

item.title: Tesla rolls out robotaxi service in Miami
item.description: Tesla said on Friday its robotaxi was available in Miami, ‌as the electric vehicle maker looks ‌to expand its autonomous ride-hailing operations. The expansion highlights ​Tesla's efforts to increase adoption of its self-driving software, a version of which it uses in the robotaxis and a key ‌par...

item.title: Tesla maps a tiny Robotaxi zone in Miami while it still can’t scale Texas
item.description: Tesla has mapped out a Robotaxi service area in Miami, publishing a geofence that covers only a small slice of the metro — mostly West Miami and a strip stretching toward Doral and Sweetwater. It’s the latest city Tesla has drawn a box around, but the announcement lands with a thud when you consi...

item.title: Tesla Model Y L Launch Series: What's Included
item.description: Tesla Model Y L Launch Series: What's Included

item.title: Tesla expands Robotaxi to Florida, marking its third state for autonomy
item.description: Tesla has expanded its Robotaxi program to Miami, Florida, marking the third state the autonomous ride-hailing platform has made its way to since launching last Summer. Tesla announced today that the Robotaxi suite would now officially launch rides in a geofence in Miami: Tesla’s “Long Weekend” c...

item.title: Tesla driver charged with manslaughter in Katy crash was Googling ‘FSD too timid’
item.description: Harris County prosecutors have charged the Tesla driver who crashed into a Katy, Texas, home and killed a 76-year-old woman with manslaughter, alleging he overrode Full Self-Driving to floor the car to 73 mph in a residential cul-de-sac. The charging document also reveals something new: in the we...

item.title: Tesla sales soar 25% in sign its troubles may be easing
item.description: Tesla’s global sales shot up 25% in the second quarter in a sign that Elon Musk’s EV maker may be turning a corner.

item.title: Elon Musk outlines Tesla Optimus production expectations
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk has tempered expectations for the company’s humanoid robot Optimus, emphasizing that initial production will ramp up slowly despite recent progress on the manufacturing line. In a July 1 reply on X, Musk responded to optimistic community speculation by stating, “No, Optimus pr...

item.title: Tesla Teases Some ‘Cool News’ —the Stock Needs It
item.description: Tesla’s vice president of vehicle engineering, Lars Moravy, recently gave a lengthy interview. There were several tidbits for investors.

item.title: Tesla Crushes Q2 Deliveries & Energy Storage Forecasts: What's Next?
item.description: TSLA's Q2 deliveries and energy storage deployments topped forecasts, with overseas EV demand and Megapack and Powerwall strength in focus.
